Professional Backdrop Stand Hardware for Custom Trade Show Displays

This large telescopic banner frame (Slider) provides a professional alternative to standard pop-up backwall displays for trade shows, events, and presentations. The adjustable Slider frame expands from 81" to 120" width and 41.5" to 96" height, accommodating multiple graphic sizes with durable telescopic pole construction.

Frame Specifications:
Frame Color: Black powder-coated finish
Material: 1.5" telescopic aluminum poles
Display Size: 96"W x 96"H maximum
Graphic Size: 96"W x 94"H
Weight: 16 lbs for easy transport

Complete Package Includes:

  • Single-sided graphic printing capability
  • Top and bottom 4.5" pole pockets sewn into fabric
  • Large telescopic Slider frame system
  • Professional black nylon carry bag
  • 1-year manufacturer warranty on frame

Optional Upgrade: Add side pole pockets for enhanced stability and professional appearance during installation.

Material Features:
Banner Material: Premium stretch fabric with dye-sublimation printing
Shipping Dimensions: Compact 41" x 5" x 4" for convenient transport
Durability: Professional-grade construction for repeated use

Backdrop Banner Stand Artwork Requirements & File Specifications

File Format Requirements:

  • Preferred formats: PDF, AI, EPS, or high-resolution PSD
  • JPEG and PNG accepted at 300 DPI minimum resolution
  • Vector files preferred for scalability and crisp text
  • CMYK color mode required for accurate print reproduction

Artwork Dimensions:

  • Graphic area: 96"W x 94"H for maximum display size
  • Include 0.25" bleed on all sides for trimming
  • Safe zone: Keep important text 1" from pole pocket areas
  • Pole pocket allowance: 4.5" top and bottom deducted from graphic height

Design Guidelines for Backdrop Stands:

  • High contrast designs work best for distance viewing
  • Minimum text size: 1" for readability from 10 feet
  • Bold fonts recommended for trade show environments
  • Consider lighting conditions at your display venue

Color Specifications:

  • CMYK color profile required for print production
  • RGB files converted automatically with possible color shift
  • Pantone colors matched as closely as possible in CMYK
  • Rich blacks recommended: C:30 M:30 Y:30 K:100

File Upload Process:

  • Maximum file size: 100MB per upload
  • Multiple file formats can be uploaded simultaneously
  • Automatic prepress review for print readiness
  • Digital proof provided before production begins

Design Support Services:

  • Free file review and print-readiness assessment
  • Professional design services available for custom artwork
  • Template downloads available for precise sizing
  • Customer service assistance with artwork questions

Questions about artwork preparation? Contact our design team for professional assistance with your backdrop banner stand graphics.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Backdrop Banner Stand Hardware - Frequently Asked Questions

What are the maximum and minimum display sizes for this backdrop stand?

The telescopic frame adjusts from a minimum of 81" width x 41.5" height up to a maximum of 96" width x 96" height. The graphic area is slightly smaller at 96"W x 94"H to account for the pole pockets.

How much does the complete backdrop stand system weigh?

The entire system weighs 16 lbs including the telescopic frame, carry bag, and all hardware components. This lightweight design makes it easy to transport to trade shows and events.

What's included with my backdrop stand hardware order?

Your complete package includes the telescopic slider frame, your custom printed graphic with sewn pole pockets (top and bottom), a professional black nylon carry bag, and a 1-year warranty on the frame components.

Can I add side pole pockets for additional stability?

Yes, you can upgrade your order to include left and right side pole pockets in addition to the standard top and bottom pockets. This provides enhanced stability and a more finished appearance.

What material is the backdrop banner printed on?

We use premium stretch fabric with dye-sublimation printing for vibrant, long-lasting graphics. The material is wrinkle-resistant and machine-washable for easy maintenance.

How long does production take for backdrop stand orders?

We offer flexible production times including 5 business days standard and 7 business days saver pricing. Rush options may be available - contact customer service for urgent orders.

What are the shipping dimensions for this product?

The backdrop stand ships in a compact 41" x 5" x 4" package weighing 16 lbs total. This compact size keeps shipping costs reasonable and makes storage convenient.

Is assembly difficult for the telescopic backdrop stand?

No tools are required for assembly. The telescopic poles slide and lock into position, and the graphic slides onto the frame via the sewn pole pockets. Complete setup instructions are included with every order.

What file formats do you accept for backdrop graphics?

We accept PDF, AI, EPS, PSD, JPEG, and PNG files. Vector formats are preferred for best quality. All files should be in CMYK color mode at 300 DPI minimum resolution.

Does the backdrop stand work for outdoor events?

The stand is designed primarily for indoor use or covered outdoor areas. While the aluminum construction is durable, we recommend avoiding direct weather exposure to maintain the longevity of both the frame and fabric graphic.
